rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (a `rfl`-proof unfolding lemma) causes simp to rewrite `includeRight a` before `counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, and `map_includeRight` can fire, making those four `@[simp]` lemmas dead in typical simp calls — a real, diff-grounded API design flaw that a maintainer would insist on fixing. Review 2 misses this entirely.
